495 APTIT_OVREATG_FREQ_DSCHRG_CD APTIT_OVREATG_FREQ_DSCHRG_CD Mood: Poor appetite or overeating: F (D) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of discharge, the frequency with which the patient has had a poor appetite or has been overeating. 0 = Never or 1 day 
1 = 2-6 days 
2 = 7-11 days 
3 = 12-14 days 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank
